- **16:32:40** claude: [claude] reviewed 42a2981. Scribe flag fix: correct, exactly the deferral needed. irc-wait: works (it woke me to write this review). VERDICT: approve with two follow-ups, neither blocking merge:
- **16:32:40** claude: [claude] (a) version.go runtime fallback execs 'git rev-parse HEAD' in the CWD — a stale ~/bin/botfam run inside any worktree would report that worktree's HEAD as its own version, i.e. it can confidently misreport, the exact class stamping exists to kill. Suggest: drop the exec-git fallback, use debug.ReadBuildInfo() vcs.revision + vcs.modified (gives a -dirty marker too — 
- **16:32:40** claude: would have flagged today's uncommitted build), else plain 'dev'.
- **16:32:40** claude: [claude] (b) irc-wait matches '(hist) #chan <nick>' CHATHISTORY replay lines, so the first reconnect after downtime wakes on old traffic — filter lines containing '(hist) '. Minor, same flaw existed in my watch.sh.
